summary: Validated 4 new enhancements on top of the PITCH11 MVP: (1) 4-tab bottom nav, (2) CSV import with live-parse + aliases + validation, (3) skill-aware team balancer + skill-count pills, (4) Match History tab with expand/restore/delete/clear-all, plus Download PNG. 17/18 acceptance criteria verified. Only Download PNG file-event was not captured in headless within 10s but button reverted from 'Rendering…' to 'Download PNG' with no error toast — per request, this is acceptable.

issues: The Emergent 'Made with Emergent' badge visually overlaps the rightmost 'History' tab. Tab is still functional via data-testid + force-click, but the label and icon are partially obscured. Pre-acknowledged in agent_to_agent_context_note — flagging for awareness only.

critical_code_review_comments: teamBalancer.js — new skill-priority assignment + same-skill pairwise swap refinement is excellent. Verified 0% diff on both 2-team (8 mixed players) and 4-team (16 mixed players) scenarios with each team receiving exactly 1× of each skill. Significant improvement over iteration 1 (12.66% → 0%).

csv.js — alias map cleanly handles bat/batsman/batter, bowl/bowler, wk/keeper/wicket-keeper, allr/ar/all-rounder/allrounder. Validates name presence, skill alias, and rating range 1–100. Errors include line numbers.
storage.js — history capped at 20 via slice(0, MAX_HISTORY) inside addHistoryEntry; ordering most-recent-first preserved.
TeamGenerator.jsx — saveToHistory() correctly invoked on every Generate. Download PNG uses html2canvas with backgroundColor + scale:2; try/catch + finally state reset is correct.
MatchHistory.jsx — expand/restore/delete actions all wire to per-id data-testids; restore via App.restoreFromHistory() rebuilds team objects with skillCounts and switches tab — confirmed working.
App.js — bulkAdd prepends to player list (order intentional); restoredMatch keyed by Date.now() forces TeamGenerator remount — clean pattern.
Minor a11y: ImportCsvDialog already has DialogDescription. Edit dialog warning from iteration 1 was fixed.
All new interactive elements expose data-testid (excellent testability).

success_rate.frontend: 94% (17/18 — Download PNG file-event not captured in headless but no runtime error / button state reverted)

seed_data_creation: Programmatically seeded localStorage 'cricket_players_v1' with two test sets: (a) 8 mixed-skill players (2 wk + 2 bowl + 2 bat + 2 allr) to verify spec scenario, and (b) 16 mixed-skill players (4 of each) for 4-team test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cleared localStorage at start. The 'Made with Emergent' floating badge overlaps the History tab; clicks must use data-testid + force=True. To verify Download PNG end-to-end in headless beyond button-state-only, dispatch a manual download monitor or extend timeout > 15s — html2canvas at scale:2 over the teams output container can be slow in headless Chromium.

test_results_detail.TEST_1_four_tabs_visible: PASS — tab-add, tab-list, tab-generate, tab-history all visible
test_results_detail.TEST_2_open_csv_dialog: PASS — dialog opens, Cancel + Import buttons present, Import disabled at 0 valid
test_results_detail.TEST_3_csv_live_parse: PASS — pasted 11 lines (incl. header) → '8 valid · 3 skipped'; preview shown; Import enabled
test_results_detail.TEST_4_csv_bulk_add: PASS — dialog closes, 8 players added to localStorage (Rohit Sharma persisted), seed 20 retained → total 28
test_results_detail.TEST_5_skill_aware_2teams: PASS — totals 359/359 (Δ 0%); each team has exactly {allr,bat,bowl,wk}; pills render '1× BAT · 1× BOW · 1× WK · 1× AR' on each card
test_results_detail.TEST_6_skill_aware_4teams: PASS — totals 324/324/324/324 (Δ 0%); each of 4 teams has exactly 1 of each skill
test_results_detail.TEST_7_history_expand_restore_delete: PASS — expand reveals breakdown, Restore navigates to Teams tab and renders team-card-1, Delete removes entry from storage
test_results_detail.TEST_8_clear_all_history: PASS — Clear all removes 'cricket_history_v1' key entirely; empty-state shown
test_results_detail.TEST_9_download_png: PARTIAL — page.expect_download timed out at 10s; however button text reverted from 'Rendering…' to 'Download PNG' (no error path), no error toast — acceptable per spec
test_results_detail.TEST_11_csv_aliases: PASS — batter, ar, allrounder, keeper all parsed → '4 valid'
